dct_title_s:
Niuewe Kaart van Caap der Goede Hoop in hare rechte jegenwoordige staat vertoond
          door
dct_alternative_sm: New map of the Cape of Good Hope
dct_description_sm: Appears in: Valentijn's Oud en Nieuw Oost Indien, vol. 5 (1724-1726)

Inset: Detail of the Cape Peninsula with names of farms and their owners. Top right: No.
        43. This map "served as a source for other map makers over a number of years."
dct_rights_sm: Image from the Dr. Oscar I. Norwich collection of maps of Africa and its islands, 1486 - ca. 1865 courtesy Stanford University Libraries. This item is in the public domain. There are no restrictions on use. If you have questions, please contact the David Rumsey Map Center at rumseymapcenter@stanford.edu.
